changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.onFailMessage: practice_finding columns already renamed to final names

changeSet.comment: Rename pre-existing practice_finding columns: target_type→artifact_type, target_id→artifact_id, contributor_id→developer_id.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename pre-existing practice_finding contributor→developer FK + index NAMES to match the entity.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE practice_finding RENAME CONSTRAINT fk_practice_finding_contributor TO fk_practice_finding_developer; ALTER INDEX idx_practice_finding_contributor_detected RENAME TO idx_practice_finding_developer_detected;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE practice_finding RENAME CONSTRAINT fk_practice_finding_developer TO fk_practice_finding_contributor; ALTER INDEX idx_practice_finding_developer_detected RENAME TO idx_practice_finding_contributor_detected;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Drop practice.category (removed from the PracticeArea/Practice model; no constraint/index depends on it).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_practice_finding_verdict' AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%OBSERVED%'

changeSet.comment: Rename verdict values POSITIVE→OBSERVED, NEGATIVE→NOT_OBSERVED and re-point the CHECK.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals

preConditions.onFailMessage: practice_finding artifact_type CHECK already admits ISSUE
preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_practice_finding_target_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%ISSUE%'

changeSet.comment: Widen the practice_finding artifact_type CHECK to admit ISSUE findings.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename reception table finding_feedback → finding_reaction (it is a verdict on a finding, not feedback).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename finding_feedback-named constraints/indexes to finding_reaction.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename finding_reaction.contributor_id→developer_id (pre-existing column).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Rename finding_reaction contributor→developer FK + index NAMES to match the entity.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE pg_get_constraintdef(oid) LIKE '%''ENACTED''%' AND conrelid = 'finding_reaction'::regclass

changeSet.comment: Rename reaction action value APPLIED→ENACTED (data + CHECK).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-1011
changeSet.comment: Re-map removed credential_mode 'OAUTH' to 'API_KEY' so persisted rows still deserialize.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE agent_config SET credential_mode = 'API_KEY' WHERE credential_mode = 'OAUTH';

changeSet.author: hephaestus-1011
changeSet.comment: AI runtime bindings + per-workspace practice-review policy (all nullable = inherit fleet default).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-1011
changeSet.comment: Bound practice-detection config FK; SET NULL on delete so a removed config degrades to fan-out.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-1011
changeSet.comment: Bound mentor config FK; SET NULL on delete so a removed config degrades to oldest-enabled fallback.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-1011
changeSet.comment: Index the FK columns. Postgres does not auto-index referencing columns, so both the ON DELETE SET NULL action and the delete-guard exists-query would otherwise seq-scan workspace on every agent_config delete. Partial (most workspaces inherit = NULL).
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX ix_workspace_practice_config ON workspace (practice_config_id) WHERE practice_config_id IS NOT NULL; CREATE INDEX ix_workspace_mentor_config ON workspace (mentor_config_id) WHERE mentor_config_id IS NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Workspace-scoped practice areas (configurable learning-objective grouping over practices).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Slug unique per workspace; the stable key survives a name rename.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Surface "findings under active areas" per workspace.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Tenancy FK. No DB cascade — the workspace purge contributor removes areas explicitly (mirrors fk_practice_workspace).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: 1:N binding column (NULL = ungrouped).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: practice → practice_area. ON DELETE SET NULL: deleting an area unbinds (never deletes) its practices.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Index the area FK: area-scoped dashboard reads join finding→practice→area.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: Artifact discriminator on practice (PULL_REQUEST | ISSUE); defaults to PULL_REQUEST.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Good/bad direction on practice (DESIRABLE | UNDESIRABLE | CONTEXTUAL); defaults to DESIRABLE.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: ADR 0021 C2: practice subject role (AUTHOR | REVIEWER); defaults to AUTHOR. Drives the reviewer/author delivery firewall. No CHECK (mirrors polarity/artifact_type; enum guarded app-side).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: B: developer-facing learner columns (nullable; surfaced only via LearnerPracticeDTO, never with criteria).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: ADR 0021 C2: cross-run finding identity (stable hash; never line/jobId) + reviewer-subject. Nullable, backfill-free.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Index the cross-run fingerprint (supersession lookups) + subject_user_id (reviewer-subject dashboards).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK practice_finding.subject_user_id to user.id, SET NULL on delete (findings survive user removal).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: A1 trend: composite index for per-target run ranking (FindingTrendService).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'practice_finding' AND column_name = 'subject_user_id' AND is_nullable = 'NO'

changeSet.comment: Collapse subject_user_id: backfill from developer_id where null, then enforce NOT NULL (entity now @Column(nullable=false)).
changeSet.sql: UPDATE practice_finding SET subject_user_id = developer_id WHERE subject_user_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: ADR 0021 C2: synthesized feedback unit (one composed lesson; supersedes rather than re-posts). baseline_state DERIVED on read, not a column.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: One feedback unit per (agent_job, unit_ordinal): the idempotency key the synthesizer dedups on.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_feedback_state'

changeSet.comment: Enum CHECKs for feedback at final allowed-lists (delivery_state column; suppression_reason includes REVIEWER_SIDE + the B2 reaction-aware reasons).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback.agent_job_id to agent_job.id (cross-module raw UUID; Liquibase-managed). CASCADE: purging a job removes its synthesized feedback.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Tenancy FK feedback.workspace_id to workspace.id. No DB cascade (mirrors fk_practice_workspace); workspace purge removes feedback explicitly.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback.recipient_user_id to user.id. SET NULL would violate NOT NULL, so RESTRICT (no onDelete): feedback blocks deleting its recipient.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback.subject_user_id to user.id (person the feedback is ABOUT). SET NULL on delete.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Self-FK feedback.supersedes_id to feedback.id (continuity chain). SET NULL on delete so pruning an old unit does not cascade-delete its successor.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Query indexes: agent_job + workspace + supersedes/recipient FKs (Postgres does not auto-index referencing columns), recipient-timeline, target lookup, feedback_thread_key supersession lookup.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='feedback' AND column_name='subject_user_id'

changeSet.comment: C: feedback.subject_user_id NOT NULL (backfill = recipient).
changeSet.sql: UPDATE feedback SET subject_user_id = recipient_user_id WHERE subject_user_id IS NULL;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: ADR 0021 C2: M:N binding of a feedback unit to the findings it was composed from. Composite PK (feedback_id, finding_id).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_feedback_finding_evidence_role'

changeSet.comment: Enum CHECK for feedback_finding.evidence_role (PRIMARY | SUPPORTING).
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE feedback_finding ADD CONSTRAINT chk_feedback_finding_evidence_role CHECK (evidence_role IN ('PRIMARY', 'SUPPORTING'));
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE feedback_finding DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_feedback_finding_evidence_role;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback_finding.feedback_id to feedback.id, CASCADE (matches OnDelete CASCADE on the entity).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback_finding.finding_id to practice_finding.id, CASCADE (matches OnDelete CASCADE on the entity).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Reverse-lookup index (finding to feedback units it fed): composite PK covers feedback_id-leading scans, this covers finding_id-leading ones + the FK ON DELETE.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: ADR 0021 C2: one concrete placement of a feedback unit on a surface (summary / inline anchor / conversation turn) with diff-anchor coordinates + posting lifecycle.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_feedback_placement_posted_state'

changeSet.comment: Enum CHECKs for feedback_placement (slot / anchor_kind / anchor_side / anchor_start_side / posted_state). The slot CHECK keeps its name chk_feedback_placement_placement.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: FK feedback_placement.feedback_id to feedback.id, CASCADE (matches OnDelete CASCADE on the entity).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Indexes: feedback_id (placements-of-a-unit + FK ON DELETE) and external_ref (reconcile a posted comment/note back to its placement).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Drop the dead feedback_post table (0 writers; superseded by the C6 feedback ledger).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: A2: add finding_reaction.finding_fingerprint + index (locus identity for reaction-aware suppression).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM finding_reaction WHERE finding_fingerprint IS NOT NULL

changeSet.comment: A2 backfill: copy the fingerprint from each reacted finding (rows whose source finding predates C2 stay null — they simply cannot participate in B2).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: A: practice_revision — append-only criteria snapshots (SCD-2).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: A: unique(practice_id, revision_number) + index + FK to practice (CASCADE).

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: A backfill: revision 1 (criteria-as-it-is) for every existing practice. Existing findings stay NULL = pre-versioning.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO practice_revision (practice_id, revision_number, criteria, created_at) SELECT id, 1, criteria, now() FROM practice;

changeSet.author: hephaestus-practice-goals
changeSet.comment: A: practice_finding.practice_revision_id (nullable) + FK SET NULL — pins a finding to the criteria it fired against.

changeSet.author: hephaestus-feedback
changeSet.comment: Drop practice_finding.guidance — advice now lives on the delivered Feedback, not the finding (ADR 0021).
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE practice_finding DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS guidance;
